title: Simple-Factions
description: A simple plugin that adds factions to your world
body:
# This plugin has been deprecated
Simple Factions is a Simple plugin that adds factions to your server. It is designed to be lightweight and easy to use, allowing players to create and manage their own factions with minimal effort, and owners to add this plugin to their server with minimal to zero setup required.
### Features - Lightweight and plug-and-play - Create, join, invite, and manage factions easily - Faction-only and public chat modes - UI-based interface for ease of use - Zero configuration needed (defaults included)
### Commands
View commands
  • /faction - Opens the Simple Factions UI
  • /faction help - Displays a list of all available faction commands
  • /faction create <name> - Creates a new faction with the given name
  • /faction delete - Deletes your current faction (owner only)
  • /faction owner - Shows the owner of your current faction
  • /faction owner <faction name> - Shows the owner of the specified faction
  • /faction members - Lists members of your current faction
  • /faction members <faction name> - Lists members of the specified faction
  • /faction invite <player name> - Invites a player to your faction
  • /faction leave - Leave your current faction
  • /faction kick <player name> - Kick a player from your faction (owner only)
  • /faction list - Shows a list of all existing factions
  • /faction modify name <new faction name> - Changes the name of your faction (owner only)
  • /faction modify color <new color name> - Changes your faction's color (owner only)
  • /faction modify owner <new owner name> - Transfers faction ownership to another member
  • /chat public or /cp - Switches your chat to public mode
  • /chat faction or /cf - Switches your chat to faction-only mode
